wp:term.wp:term_description: We will provide a single logo concept with 2 rounds of revisions.
We will provide 3 logo concepts with 2 rounds of revisions to your chosen concept.
We will provide 5 logo concepts with 2 rounds of revisions to your chosen concept.
We will provide 5 logo concepts with 2 rounds of revisions to your chosen concept. Additionally, we will provide a brand guideline PDF to help manage your brand.

item.title: A Night Of Dizzy Spells
item.dc:creator: david
item.content:encoded: "A Night Of Dizzy Spells" from Resistor Anthems by Eric Skiff. Released: 2008. Track 1. Genre: Chiptune.

item.title: Underclocked (underunderclocked mix)
item.dc:creator: david
item.content:encoded: "Underclocked (underunderclocked mix)" from Resistor Anthems by Eric Skiff. Released: 2008. Track 2. Genre: Chiptune.

item.title: Chibi Ninja

item.title: All of Us
item.dc:creator: david
item.content:encoded: "All of Us" from Resistor Anthems by Eric Skiff. Released: 2008. Track 4. Genre: Chiptune.

item.title: Come and Find Me
item.dc:creator: david
item.content:encoded: "Come and Find Me" from Resistor Anthems by Eric Skiff. Released: 2008. Track 5. Genre: Chiptune.

item.title: Home
item.dc:creator: david
item.content:encoded:
Our Work Speaks For Itself

At Agency, we let the work speak for itself. Our team of experienced designers, developers, and marketing geniuses, are ready to create eye-catching apps and software for your brand. Agency was founded and headquartered in Sarasota, Florida.

Recent Software Releases

Our Clients

item.excerpt:encoded:
A Creative Software Agency
Developing Meaningful Work

Let us bring your business into the 21st century.

View Services

item.title: About
item.dc:creator: david
item.content:encoded:
Agency was founded by Jack and Jill Roberts in 2012. The business is headquartered in Sarasota, FL. The partners are a husband and wife team with a background in design, marketing, and advertising. At Agency, each client is treated like a family member. As a result, we work closely with each client to provide the best results possible.

Vestibulum id ligula porta felis euismod semper. Fusce dapibus, tellus ac cursus commodo, tortor mauris condimentum nibh, ut fermentum massa justo sit amet risus. Vivamus sagittis lacus vel augue laoreet rutrum faucibus dolor auctor. Morbi leo risus, porta ac consectetur ac, vestibulum at eros. Etiam porta sem malesuada magna mollis euismod.

Vivamus sagittis lacus vel augue laoreet rutrum faucibus dolor auctor. Vivamus sagittis lacus vel augue laoreet rutrum faucibus dolor auctor. Aenean lacinia bibendum nulla sed consectetur. Duis mollis, est non commodo luctus, nisi erat porttitor ligula, eget lacinia odio sem nec elit. Curabitur blandit tempus porttitor.

Our Team

Jack Roberts

CEO & Marketing Director

Jack has over 10 years experience in marketing, creating successful campaigns for several Fortune 500 companies. In his spare time, he enjoys biking, soccer, and is a champion Starcraft II player.

Jill Roberts

President & Creative Director

Jill has a gift for design. She has won several awards for her talents. Her work is published in Taschen books for graphic design, web design, and branding. In her spare time, she enjoys jogging and painting.
item.excerpt:encoded:
About Us

We're a husband and wife team dedicated
to producing exceptional work.

item.title: Slideshow
item.dc:creator: david
item.content:encoded:
This page is using the Slideshow page template. To create a slideshow using the Slideshow page template, you'll first need to create and publish a page withe the "Slideshow" page template applied to it.

If using the classic editor: Within the page editor, add a gallery by selecting Add Media > Create Gallery. Select your images, then click the blue “Create A New Gallery” button.

If using the Gutenberg editor: You will need to add the slideshow gallery by using the Shortcodes block, and listing the image ID numbers within the shortcode. You can find the image number by selecting “Media” in the dashboard, then clicking on an image. The number displayed at the end of the URL at the top is the image number. The following Codex page explains the Gallery Shortcode in greater detail: https://codex.wordpress.org/Gallery_Shortcode. It should look like this:

item.title: Services
item.dc:creator: david
item.content:encoded:
Agency provides a variety of creative services. Many of these services may be purchased directly on our site. However, if you need a custom quote, you may contact us directly with your project details.

Design Services

Web Services

item.title: Our New Office Downtown
item.dc:creator: david
item.content:encoded:

item.title: How To Sell Services As Products Online
item.dc:creator: david
item.content:encoded:
Selling your services online is easier than you think. Our agency can help productize your services. Then, you can offer them as packages on your website!

item.excerpt:encoded: Choose from a variety of logo design concept and branding packages. If an existing package does not meet your needs, contact us for a personal quote.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: We'll provide a single logo concept with up to 2 rounds of revisions.
We'll provide 3 logo concepts with up to 2 rounds of revisions to your chosen concept.
We'll provide 5 logo concepts with up to 2 rounds of revisions to your chosen concept.
We'll provide unlimited logo concepts and revisions to your chosen concept. Additionally, you will receive a printed and PDF branding guide.

item.title: WordPress Web Design
item.dc:creator: david
item.content:encoded:

item.excerpt:encoded: Our team will build a WordPress powered website for you with standard functionality, including basic plugins for contact forms, spam protection, security, and SEO management. If you are in need of a custom eCommerce or community website, contact us for a personalized quote.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: A standard WordPress website with up to 10 pages. Our team will source any media required.
A standard WordPress website with up to 20 pages. Our team will source any media required.
A standard WordPress website with up to 50 pages. Our team will source any media required.

item.excerpt:encoded: Our video production team will create a video for your business or brand, designed for advertising, marketing, and promotion.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: A promotional video up to 1 minute in duration.

item.excerpt:encoded: Our Image Gallery plugin is designed to work with WordPress Gutenberg. The plugin includes several options for changing the layout and style. Additionally, it features a lazy load script to ensure that your images load without effecting your website performance.

item.excerpt:encoded:
Tasteful Is An excellent website template for food and drink brands.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: A promotional video up to 30 seconds in duration.
A promotional video up to 15 seconds in duration.
A promotional video up to 3 minutes in duration.
A standard bi-fold brochure size. Our team will design front and back.
A standard tri-fold brochure size. Our team will design front and back.
A large tri-fold brochure size. Our team will design front and back.
A large five-fold brochure size. Our team will design front and back.
A basic food and drink adhesive label design with separate nutritional facts.
We will design the packaging and container for your food and drink product.
Packaging design for products under 1 pound.
Packaging design for products between 1 to 10 pounds.
Packaging design for products between 10 and 50 pounds.
